phases.name: Announcement & Notification
phases.description: Election Commission announces election dates, issues notification, and the Model Code of Conduct comes into effect.
details: Model Code of Conduct enforced immediately

phases.name: Nomination Filing
phases.description: Candidates file their nomination papers along with required documents and security deposit.
details: Affidavit with criminal, financial, educational details

voter_registration.title: Voter Registration Guide
steps: NVSP Portal or Voter Helpline App

quiz.q: What is the minimum age to vote in India?
quiz.explanation: The voting age was reduced from 21 to 18 years by the 61st Amendment Act, 1988.

quiz.q: Which body conducts elections in India?
quiz.explanation: The Election Commission of India (ECI) is the constitutional body that conducts all major elections.
EVM stands for Electronic Voting Machine, used since 1982 in India.
